summary: Iteration 55 - File/Audio Sharing in In-App Messaging. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Login with submitkalmori@gmail.com works
Backend: GET /api/messages/conversations returns list
Backend: POST /api/messages/{convo_id}/upload - upload text file returns file_url, file_name, file_type, file_size
Backend: POST /api/messages/{convo_id}/upload - audio file returns file_type='audio'
Backend: POST /api/messages/{convo_id}/upload - image file returns file_type='image'
Backend: GET /api/messages/file/{path} - download uploaded file works
Backend: GET /api/messages/{convo_id} - messages with file attachments include all file fields
Backend: POST /api/messages/{convo_id}/upload - returns 404 for non-participant
Backend: GET /api/messages/file/{path} - returns 403 for non-participant
Backend: Messages privacy - user cannot access other users' conversations (404)
Backend: Text messages still work (POST /api/messages/{convo_id})
Frontend: Login with submitkalmori@gmail.com works
Frontend: Navigate to /messages page works
Frontend: Messages page shows 'Messages' title
Frontend: Conversation list displays conversations
Frontend: Clicking conversation opens chat view
Frontend: Paperclip button (attach-file-btn) is visible next to message input
Frontend: File input element exists with correct accept attribute (audio/*,image/*,.pdf,.zip,.wav,.mp3,.flac,.aif,.aiff,.stem,.txt,.doc,.docx)
Frontend: Sent file messages display with file name, size, and download link
Frontend: Audio files display with AudioPlayer component (play button)
Frontend: Image files display with inline preview
Frontend: System message 'Collaboration accepted!' styled as centered pill
Frontend: Text messages still work (type + send button)
Frontend: Uploading state indicator code present (animate-spin spinner)
seed_data_creation: Test files uploaded during testing: test_stem_v2.txt, beat_draft.wav, cover_art.png. Test users created for privacy tests were not cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 55 tested file/audio sharing in the messaging system. All features working: upload endpoint stores files in Emergent Object Storage at APP_NAME/chat/{convo_id}/{uuid}.{ext}, file download validates user is conversation participant, file_type detection works (audio/image/file), messages include file_url, file_name, file_type, file_size fields. Frontend displays files correctly with AudioPlayer for audio, inline preview for images, and download links for other files. System messages styled as centered pills. Conversation exists between admin (submitkalmori@gmail.com) and 'Collab Artist' test user.

endpoints.POST /api/messages/{convo_id}/upload: Upload file to chat, returns message with file_url, file_name, file_type, file_size
endpoints.GET /api/messages/file/{path}: Download chat file with participant validation (403 for non-participant)

frontend_components.AudioPlayer: Displays audio files with play/pause button
frontend_components.FileAttachment: Displays file name, size, and download link
frontend_components.ImagePreview: Inline image preview for image files
